recommendations.title: Plane Crazy
recommendations.overview: Referred as the actual first Mickey Mouse short. Inspired by Lindbergh's flight from New York to Paris, Mickey builds a plane to take Minnie for a trip.

recommendations.title: The Skeleton Dance
recommendations.overview: The clock strikes midnight, the bats fly from the belfry, a dog howls at the full moon, and two black cats fight in the cemetery: a perfect time for four skeletons to come out and dance a bit.

recommendations.title: Get a Horse!
recommendations.overview: Mickey, Minnie, Horace Horsecollar, and Clarabelle Cow go on a musical wagon ride until Peg-Leg Pete tries to run them off the road.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Studio
recommendations.overview: Created for Disney's 100th anniversary, the short features Mickey Mouse corralling a gallery of legendary Disney characters for a group photo.

recommendations.title: The Golden Touch
recommendations.overview: King Midas is visited by an elf; the elf turns his cat to gold, then claps his hands and it changes back. Midas begs for the golden touch, but the elf warns him it would be a curse to him. Midas insists. He dances about joyfully at first, but discove

recommendations.title: Thru the Mirror
recommendations.overview: Mickey has been reading Alice in Wonderland, and falls asleep. He finds himself on the other side of the mirror, where the furniture is alive.

recommendations.title: Mickey, Donald, Goofy: The Three Musketeers
recommendations.overview: In Disney's take on the Alexander Dumas tale, Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck and Goofy want nothing more than to perform brave deeds on behalf of their queen (Minnie Mouse), but they're stymied by the head Musketeer, Pete. Pete secretly wants to get rid o

recommendations.title: Santa's Workshop
recommendations.overview: Santa's little helpers must hurry to finish the toys before Christmas Day.

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Lonesome Ghosts
recommendations.overview: On a dark and stormy night, four bored ghosts decide to have some fun by calling the Ajax Ghost Exterminators.
